name: Tech Innovators Summit
description: Join leading tech minds from across the country for a full-day summit featuring live demos, expert panels, and networking opportunities that dive deep into the future of innovation and digital transformation.

name: Art & Soul Exhibition
description: Experience the magic of creativity at the Art & Soul Exhibition, where traditional and contemporary artworks converge to showcase the cultural richness and artistic brilliance of Bangladesh and beyond.

name: Startup Launchpad
description: A must-attend event for budding entrepreneurs! Pitch your startup to a panel of seasoned investors, receive expert mentoring, and connect with key stakeholders in the startup ecosystem.

name: Street Art Festival
description: Color your world at the Street Art Festival with dynamic graffiti walls, live mural creations, street performances, and interactive art zones celebrating urban creativity and public expression.

name: AI Conference 2025
description: Step into the future at Bangladesh’s premier AI Conference featuring keynote speakers from top tech giants, hands-on workshops, and in-depth sessions on the latest trends in artificial intelligence and machine learning.

name: Modern Sculptures Showcase
description: Marvel at a curated display of bold and expressive modern sculptures crafted by talented artists, blending form, material, and imagination in a way that challenges traditional boundaries of art.

name: Digital Transformation Talk
description: Learn how digital tools and technologies are revolutionizing industries. This event brings together thought leaders and IT professionals to discuss real-world case studies and strategic digital initiatives.

name: Bangladesh Art Biennale
description: A grand celebration of South Asian art and culture, the Bangladesh Art Biennale presents a diverse collection of paintings, installations, and multimedia works from renowned and emerging artists.

name: Women in Tech Forum
description: Celebrate and empower women in technology through inspiring talks, mentorship sessions, panel discussions, and career guidance to bridge the gender gap in the tech industry.

name: Visual Storytelling Workshop
description: Unlock the secrets of visual storytelling through illustration, photography, and mixed media. This hands-on workshop is perfect for creatives who want to amplify their narrative power using visuals.
